question_intent: Get the name of the employee who handled the most orders for products in the 'Beverages' category in 1997

plan.question_intent: Get the name of the employee who handled the most orders for products in the 'Beverages' category in 1997
plan.detail_query: SELECT e.employeeid, e.firstname, e.lastname, COUNT(o.orderid) AS order_count FROM employees AS e JOIN orders AS o ON e.employeeid = o.employeeid JOIN "order details" AS od ON o.orderid = od.orderid JOIN products AS p ON od.productid = p.productid JOIN categories AS c ON p.categoryid = c.categoryid WHERE (c.categoryname = 'Beverages') AND (STRFTIME('%Y', o.orderdate) = '1997') GROUP BY e.employeeid ORDER BY order_count DESC

blocks.name: leaf_1
blocks.select_clause: SELECT e.employeeid, e.firstname, e.lastname, COUNT(o.orderid) AS order_count
join_clauses: JOIN orders AS o ON e.employeeid = o.employeeid
JOIN "order details" AS od ON o.orderid = od.orderid
JOIN products AS p ON od.productid = p.productid
JOIN categories AS c ON p.categoryid = c.categoryid
blocks.notes: Counts the number of orders handled by each employee for products in the 'Beverages' category in 1997

blocks.name: root
blocks.from_clause: FROM (SELECT employeeid, firstname, lastname, order_count FROM (SELECT e.employeeid, e.firstname, e.lastname, COUNT(o.orderid) AS order_count FROM employees AS e JOIN orders AS o ON e.employeeid = o.employeeid JOIN "order details" AS od ON o.orderid = od.orderid JOIN products AS p ON od.productid = p.productid JOIN categories AS c ON p.categoryid = c.categoryid WHERE (c.categoryname = 'Beverages') AND (STRFTIME('%Y', o.orderdate) = '1997') GROUP BY e.employeeid) ORDER BY order_count DESC LIMIT 1) AS leaf_1
blocks.notes: Returns the full name of the employee with the most orders for 'Beverages' in 1997

build_logs.notes: Counts the number of orders handled by each employee for products in the 'Beverages' category in 1997

steps.sql:
SELECT *
FROM employees AS e
LIMIT 5

preview.notes: Andrew received his BTS commercial in 1974 and a Ph.D. in international marketing from the University of Dallas in 1981.  He is fluent in French and Italian and reads German.  He joined the company as a sales representative, was promoted to sales manager in January 1992 and to vice president of sales in March 1993.  Andrew is a member of the Sales Management Roundtable, the Seattle Chamber of Commerce, and the Pacific Rim Importers Association.

preview.notes: Steven Buchanan graduated from St. Andrews University, Scotland, with a BSC degree in 1976.  Upon joining the company as a sales representative in 1992, he spent 6 months in an orientation program at the Seattle office and then returned to his permanent post in London.  He was promoted to sales manager in March 1993.  Mr. Buchanan has completed the courses "Successful Telemarketing" and "International Sales Management."  He is fluent in French.

steps.clause: JOIN orders AS o ON e.employeeid = o.employeeid
steps.sql:
SELECT *
FROM employees AS e
JOIN orders AS o ON e.employeeid = o.employeeid
LIMIT 5

steps.clause: JOIN "order details" AS od ON o.orderid = od.orderid
steps.sql:
SELECT *
FROM employees AS e
JOIN orders AS o ON e.employeeid = o.employeeid
JOIN "order details" AS od ON o.orderid = od.orderid
LIMIT 5

preview.notes: Margaret holds a BA in English literature from Concordia College (1958) and an MA from the American Institute of Culinary Arts (1966).  She was assigned to the London office temporarily from July through November 1992.

steps.clause: JOIN products AS p ON od.productid = p.productid
steps.sql:
SELECT *
FROM employees AS e
JOIN orders AS o ON e.employeeid = o.employeeid
JOIN "order details" AS od ON o.orderid = od.orderid
JOIN products AS p ON od.productid = p.productid
LIMIT 5

preview.notes: Margaret holds a BA in English literature from Concordia College (1958) and an MA from the American Institute of Culinary Arts (1966).  She was assigned to the London office temporarily from July through November 1992.

steps.clause: JOIN categories AS c ON p.categoryid = c.categoryid
steps.sql:
SELECT *
FROM employees AS e
JOIN orders AS o ON e.employeeid = o.employeeid
JOIN "order details" AS od ON o.orderid = od.orderid
JOIN products AS p ON od.productid = p.productid
JOIN categories AS c ON p.categoryid = c.categoryid
LIMIT 5

steps.sql:
SELECT *
FROM employees AS e
JOIN orders AS o ON e.employeeid = o.employeeid
JOIN "order details" AS od ON o.orderid = od.orderid
JOIN products AS p ON od.productid = p.productid
JOIN categories AS c ON p.categoryid = c.categoryid
WHERE (c.categoryname = 'Beverages')
LIMIT 5

preview.notes: Steven Buchanan graduated from St. Andrews University, Scotland, with a BSC degree in 1976.  Upon joining the company as a sales representative in 1992, he spent 6 months in an orientation program at the Seattle office and then returned to his permanent post in London.  He was promoted to sales manager in March 1993.  Mr. Buchanan has completed the courses "Successful Telemarketing" and "International Sales Management."  He is fluent in French.

preview.notes: Steven Buchanan graduated from St. Andrews University, Scotland, with a BSC degree in 1976.  Upon joining the company as a sales representative in 1992, he spent 6 months in an orientation program at the Seattle office and then returned to his permanent post in London.  He was promoted to sales manager in March 1993.  Mr. Buchanan has completed the courses "Successful Telemarketing" and "International Sales Management."  He is fluent in French.

steps.sql:
SELECT *
FROM employees AS e
JOIN orders AS o ON e.employeeid = o.employeeid
JOIN "order details" AS od ON o.orderid = od.orderid
JOIN products AS p ON od.productid = p.productid
JOIN categories AS c ON p.categoryid = c.categoryid
WHERE (c.categoryname = 'Beverages') AND (STRFTIME('%Y', o.orderdate) = '1997')
LIMIT 5

preview.notes: Andrew received his BTS commercial in 1974 and a Ph.D. in international marketing from the University of Dallas in 1981.  He is fluent in French and Italian and reads German.  He joined the company as a sales representative, was promoted to sales manager in January 1992 and to vice president of sales in March 1993.  Andrew is a member of the Sales Management Roundtable, the Seattle Chamber of Commerce, and the Pacific Rim Importers Association.

steps.sql:
SELECT e.employeeid, e.firstname, e.lastname, COUNT(o.orderid) AS order_count
FROM employees AS e
JOIN orders AS o ON e.employeeid = o.employeeid
JOIN "order details" AS od ON o.orderid = od.orderid
JOIN products AS p ON od.productid = p.productid
JOIN categories AS c ON p.categoryid = c.categoryid
WHERE (c.categoryname = 'Beverages') AND (STRFTIME('%Y', o.orderdate) = '1997')
GROUP BY e.employeeid

build_logs.notes: Returns the full name of the employee with the most orders for 'Beverages' in 1997

steps.sql:
SELECT *
FROM (SELECT employeeid, firstname, lastname, order_count FROM (SELECT e.employeeid, e.firstname, e.lastname, COUNT(o.orderid) AS order_count FROM employees AS e JOIN orders AS o ON e.employeeid = o.employeeid JOIN "order details" AS od ON o.orderid = od.orderid JOIN products AS p ON od.productid = p.productid JOIN categories AS c ON p.categoryid = c.categoryid WHERE (c.categoryname = 'Beverages') AND (STRFTIME('%Y', o.orderdate) = '1997') GROUP BY e.employeeid) ORDER BY order_count DESC LIMIT 1) AS leaf_1
LIMIT 5

SELECT leaf_1.firstname || ' ' || leaf_1.lastname AS employee_name
FROM (SELECT employeeid, firstname, lastname, order_count FROM (SELECT e.employeeid, e.firstname, e.lastname, COUNT(o.orderid) AS order_count FROM employees AS e JOIN orders AS o ON e.employeeid = o.employeeid JOIN "order details" AS od ON o.orderid = od.orderid JOIN products AS p ON od.productid = p.productid JOIN categories AS c ON p.categoryid = c.categoryid WHERE (c.categoryname = 'Beverages') AND (STRFTIME('%Y', o.orderdate) = '1997') GROUP BY e.employeeid) ORDER BY order_count DESC LIMIT 1) AS leaf_1

nearest.sql:
SELECT firstname
FROM (SELECT firstname, unitprice FROM (SELECT e.employeeid, e.firstname, p.productid, p.unitprice, o.orderdate, c.categoryname
FROM employees e
JOIN orders o ON e.employeeid = o.employeeid
JOIN "order details" od ON o.orderid = od.orderid
JOIN products p ON od.productid = p.productid
JOIN categories c ON p.categoryid = c.categoryid
WHERE (c.categoryname = 'Confections') AND (strftime('%Y', o.orderdate) IN ('1997', '1998'))) ORDER BY unitprice DESC LIMIT 1) AS leaf_1

question: What is the name of the employee who processed the highest number of orders in the Beverages category during 1997?
